summary: Iteration 114 - Testing TrendScout admin automation button fixes for CSRF handling and response.json() body stream issues. All 8 backend tests passed. All 7 frontend automation buttons work correctly with success toasts. No 'body stream already read' errors found.
passed_tests: POST /api/automation/run with job_type full_pipeline returns success (200)
GET /api/automation/stats returns stats with expected fields (200)
Frontend: 'Run Scoring' card click shows success toast 'Updated 229 products'
Frontend: 'AI Summaries' card click shows success toast 'Generated AI summaries for 229 products'
Frontend: 'Generate Alerts' card click shows success toast 'Generated 37 new alerts'
Frontend: Amazon 'Run Import' button shows success toast 'Imported 15 products from Amazon Movers & Shakers'
Frontend: TikTok 'Run Import' button shows success toast 'Imported 15 products from TikTok Creative Center'
Frontend: Supplier 'Run Import' button shows success toast 'Imported 15 products from Supplier Feeds'
Frontend: 'Full Data Sync' button shows success 'Full Sync Complete - Imported 45 products • Generated 14 alerts'
No 'body stream already read' errors in console
No 'Failed to run trend scoring' errors
critical_code_review_comments: api.js correctly implements CSRF token handling via getCsrfToken() reading __Host-csrf cookie
apiPost/apiGet/apiPut/apiDelete wrappers properly include credentials: 'include' for cookie handling
All response.json() calls now have .catch(() => ({})) to prevent body stream errors
DataIngestionPanel.jsx correctly uses apiPost from @/lib/api for all import endpoints
productService.js correctly uses apiPost for /api/automation/run endpoint
alertService.js correctly uses apiPut for alert operations
automationLogService.js correctly uses apiGet for logs/stats endpoints
WebSocket connection errors are unrelated to the fix (notification system, not automation)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 114 verified the fix for admin automation button failures. The root cause was raw fetch() calls without CSRF handling and unsafe response.json() calls. Fix: All raw fetch calls converted to use apiPost/apiGet/apiPut/apiDelete from @/lib/api.js which handles auth, CSRF tokens, and 401 retries. All automation endpoints work: /api/automation/run, /api/automation/logs, /api/automation/stats, /api/ingestion/amazon, /api/ingestion/tiktok, /api/ingestion/supplier, /api/ingestion/full-sync. Admin page at /admin/automation has quick action cards (Run Scoring, AI Summaries, Generate Alerts) and Data Sources tab with Run Import buttons.

original_errors: Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read
verified_fix.root_cause: Raw fetch() calls without CSRF handling and unsafe response.json() calls
verified_fix.fix_applied: Converted all raw fetch calls to use apiPost/apiGet/apiPut/apiDelete from api.js with CSRF tokens and .catch() on response.json()
verified_fix.verification_result: All automation buttons now work correctly with success toasts, no body stream errors

console_errors.details: WebSocket connection errors (notification system, unrelated to fix) and 403 for external resources (favicon/analytics)
